hero.title: Hi, I'm Ostap
hero.description1: Hi! I'm Ostap Demchuk, a motivated and driven individual who enjoys taking on new challenges and constantly improving myself.
hero.description2: I am a hardworking and positive person with a strong sense of responsibility. I value discipline, consistency, and always giving my best in everything I do.
hero.description3: I enjoy working with people, learning from others, and growing in environments where I can push my limits and develop both personally and professionally.
hero.description4: My goal is to become a reliable and skilled professional who can contribute to meaningful projects and create real impact through my work.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for opportunities, collaboration, or just to connect.

projects.title: Projects
projects.chatappDesc: A full-stack real-time chat application with user authentication, responsive design, and instant messaging features.
projects.posDesc: A full-stack POS web app with authentication, order management, and Stripe payment integration.
projects.ecommerceDesc: An AI-powered customer support chatbot built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Lucide React, and Redux Toolkit for state management.
projects.medicalDesc: An AI-powered medical chatbot that uses LangChain, Pinecone, Flask, and OpenAI to answer medical-related questions using vector search and LLM responses.
projects.todoDesc: A simple and clean to-do list application built with React.
projects.libraryDesc: A Java-based library management system with book handling, borrowing logic, validation, and unit testing.
